case_title: MATTHEW STUART MCKENZIE VS. UNIVERSITY CITY, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION DBA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCKENZIE, MATTHEW STUART AS TO DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY CITY, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION DBA ONE COSMOS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
